Match: Checks for setting the environment variable NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED to 0, which disables TLS verification. This should only be used for debugging purposes. Setting the option rejectUnauthorized t

Extra.cwe: CWE-319: Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
